title: Vitality Mastery
summary: Vitality separates endurance-focused survival from recovery-focused staying power, making defensive growth feel like a deliberate identity rather than passive stat gain.

thresholds.title: Survivor's Instinct
thresholds.description: Your resilience style becomes more distinct.

thresholds.title: Legendary Constitution
thresholds.description: Late-game vitality rewards committed survival investment.

nodes.title: Iron Reserve
nodes.description: A branch focused on raw staying power under pressure.

nodes.title: Restorative Bloom
nodes.description: A branch focused on recovery windows and bounce-back potential.

nodes.title: Last Stand
nodes.description: Deepens endurance into tougher clutch survival.

nodes.title: Rapid Recovery
nodes.description: Deepens recovery into steadier post-damage stabilization.

nodes.title: Stoneheart
nodes.description: Commits fully to the endurance line.

nodes.title: Renewing Core
nodes.description: Commits fully to the recovery line.
